0.text: Focal consolidations in the posterior segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Air cysts in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Air cysts in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Tree-in-bud opacities in the lower lobes

4.text: Multifocal nodules in both lungs with a miliary pattern

5.text: Confluence of nodules in the lower lobes

6.text: Lesion in the apicoposterior segment of the right upper lobe has enlarged
